data.body: 5566 (sediment-oscitant-snake) doc-sweep committed 9e391bf. Purged all guide/reference docs (config.md, plan-review-gate, review-kernel, manifest-signing, llm-framework, jira-sync-setup, README, CLAUDE.md, CLI help) of the 7 removed keys; ADRs keep historical refs + surgical retirement parentheticals. Fixed stale release-notes 'use instead' pointer. USER CONFIRMED (asked): KEEP the changelog/migration one-way-door removal-records in migrations.md + release-notes.md (they announce removals; 7ed9 AC requires the release-notes warning; analogous to ADR historical records). Verified: config loads clean, lint clean, snapshot-docs drift tests 6 pass. 6-change stack complete: c366->28f1->4cdf->7ed9->d6bd->5566. Pushing 5566.
